channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iran says obstacles remain, but acknowledges deal taking shape with U.S.
item.description: As the Trump administration signals hope for a possible deal, Iran says obstacles linger, and frequent changes in U.S. positions are not helping.

item.title: Southern California officials trying to prevent explosion or leak from damaged chemical tank
item.description: Authorities are trying to reduce the risk of a possible explosion or leak from a damaged chemical tank at a facility in Southern California.

item.title: Trump approves emergency declaration for California chemical leak, Newsom says
item.description: California crews conducted an overnight operation at the Orange County site of a chemical leak in Garden Grove and said Monday that the threat of a major incident has been reduced.

item.title: California chemical tank no longer under threat of catastrophic explosion: Officials
item.description: The failing chemical tank in Southern California that caused tens of thousands of people to evacuate is no longer presenting a threat of explosion, officials said.
